title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: **Findings (Concrete, Implementable)** 1. **`fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner` currently permits single-lane execution paths (workflow violation).** In feed-runner, local runner guards allow `--max-parallel 1` / `--linked-max-parallel 1` (`< 1` check only): [`run-local-orchestration.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L249), [`run-local-orchestration.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L261), [`run-linked-systems.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh#L86). Main repo enforces `>= 2` and has dedicated guard tests wired into gate: [`run-local-orchestration.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L268), [`run-linked-systems.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh#L86), [`test-parallel-floor-policy.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-parallel-floor-policy.sh#L22), [`fugue-orchestration-gate.yml`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L42). 2. **Feed-runner’s workflow handoff contract is behind main and drops control-plane context at dispatch boundary.** Feed-runner handoff dispatch sends a minimal set (issue/nonce/handoff/trust/vote): [`route-task-handoff.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh#L454). Feed-runner caller `workflow_dispatch` inputs are also minimal: [`fugue-tutti-caller.yml`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L7). Main repo already carries richer handoff fields (`requested_execution_mode`, `implement_request`, `implement_confirmed`, `vote_command`, `kernel_handoff_mode`, `intake_source`, cost/fallback metadata): [`route-task-handoff.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh#L527), [`fugue-tutti-caller.yml`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L38), [`fugue-tutti-caller.yml`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L661). 3. **Feed-runner gate is missing execution of core control-plane tests that already exist (and pass manually).** Gate currently runs a narrow subset: [`fugue-orchestration-gate.yml`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L120), [`fugue-orchestration-gate.yml`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L157). Unwired but present core tests include: [`test-orchestrator-policy.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/tests/test-orchestrator-policy.sh#L4), [`test-execution-profile-policy.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/tests/test-execution-profile-policy.sh#L4), [`test-workflow-risk-policy.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/tests/test-workflow-risk-policy.sh#L4), [`test-fugue-bridge-handoff.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/tests/test-fugue-bridge-handoff.sh#L5), [`test-mcp-adapter-policy.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/tests/test-mcp-adapter-policy.sh#L5), [`test-mcp-adapter-exec.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/tests/test-mcp-adapter-exec.sh#L5). These all passed in manual run during this audit. 4. **Both repos still have a preflight enforcement gap vs their own migration/readiness docs.** Docs define sovereign/peripheral checks as primary entry points and call out promoting `sim-kernel-peripherals` to required preflight: [`kernel-fugue-migration-audit.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-fugue-migration-audit.md#L133), [`kernel-preimplementation-readiness.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-preimplementation-readiness.md#L119), [`kernel-preimplementation-readiness.md`](/U...
